overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit covered market bazaar at night. The player examines a vinyl record stall and continues exploring various food vendors and stalls in a dense cyberpunk setting with red paper lanterns and holographic signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered cyberpunk market entrance with vending and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the market entrance past a bright yellow vending machine toward the food stall area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the noodle bar counter preparing food

entered.detail: bright yellow vending machine with red illuminated display showing beverage ads
large circular neon sign with green border and pink text reading WAGAMI MARKET
industrial metal beam structure with corrugated roofing and hanging red paper lanterns
wooden counter with green bar stools and blue neon strip lighting underneath
food kiosk with yellow roof canopy and illuminated menu displays

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered cyberpunk market at night, passing a yellow vending machine on the left. The path leads toward food stalls under a metal roof structure decorated with red paper lanterns. A noodle bar with green stools is visible on the left, while a neon WAGAMI MARKET sign glows in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: vinyl record merchandise stall with display cases

events.description: player stops walking to examine vinyl records in the glass display case
player turns around and resumes walking away from the record stall

agents.ego_description: stopping to examine the vinyl records in the display case, then turning to leave the stall

entered.detail: glass display case containing vinyl records with CHIPPIN IN signage visible
backlit wall with circular vinyl records arranged in a grid behind wire mesh

segments.scene_description: The player stops at a vinyl record stall to examine the merchandise in glass display cases. The stall features a backlit wall with records arranged in a grid pattern. After a moment, the player turns away from the stall to continue exploring the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: market dining area with noodle bar and mobile food cart

events.description: passing by the noodle bar where customers are seated on stools eating

agents.ego_description: walking past the noodle bar where customers are seated and continuing toward the food cart and steps area

notable_agents.action: customer with white hair sitting at noodle bar counter eating from a bowl
vendor standing at green food cart with steam rising from cooking equipment

entered.detail: mobile food cart with green metal body and canopy with neon lighting
vertical illuminated sign featuring a blue moon and tree silhouette graphic
concrete steps with red painted edges leading to upper market level

segments.scene_description: The player walks past the noodle bar where a customer with white hair sits eating. A green food cart with steam rising from it is visible on the right. The path leads toward concrete steps with red edges, while a blue vertical sign with a moon graphic stands near the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear market area with steps and multiple vendor stalls

events.description: ascending the concrete steps into the rear section of the market

agents.ego_description: walking up the red-edged steps and exploring the rear market area with various stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor in green shirt arranging items at a market stall

entered.detail: neon sign for FUYU OVERCLOCK shop with stylized text
pink illuminated arcade game machine near the steps
cluster of various vendor stalls with different signage and goods

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the concrete steps into the rear market area. Various vendor stalls line the path, including one with a vendor in a green shirt. Neon signs including one for FUYU OVERCLOCK and a pink arcade machine are visible in the background as the player continues deeper into the market.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk bazaar that transitions from a main thoroughfare into a more secluded rear market area. It begins by entering a covered market past a yellow vending machine, moving under a metal roof adorned with red paper lanterns toward a glowing WAGAMI MARKET sign. The camera then pauses to examine vinyl records in backlit glass display cases before turning away to pass a steaming green food cart and a noodle bar where a white-haired customer sits. As the path leads toward concrete steps with red edges and a blue moon graphic sign, the camera ascends the stairs to enter a secondary market zone. The scene finally opens up to reveal a deeper array of vendor stalls, including a man in a green shirt, while pink arcade machines and a FUYU OVERCLOCK neon sign glow in the background.
